title: Redefining Intimacy
caption: Are you ready to explore a deeper connection?
layout: Two-column compare. The left column lists traditional views of intimacy, like physical touch and communication. The right column explores broader concepts, such as emotional sharing, vulnerability, and shared experiences.

title: The Pleasure Principle
caption: Are you embracing your pleasure at this stage of life?
layout: Cycle diagram. Sections include: 'Understanding', 'Exploring', 'Embracing', and 'Celebrating'. Each section outlines practical tips and insights for enhancing pleasure in midlife.

title: Navigating Relationship Changes
caption: Are you feeling the shifts in your relationship dynamics?
layout: 4-stage progression. Stages include: 'Awareness', 'Communication', 'Adaptation', and 'Transformation', with key actions and reflections for each stage.

title: Self-Care vs Self-Sacrifice
caption: Where do you stand on the self-care spectrum?
layout: 2x2 grid. The axes represent 'Feelings of Guilt' (low/high) and 'Time Invested in Self' (low/high). Each quadrant describes different scenarios and outcomes for self-care practices.

title: What Makes You Tick?
caption: Are you in tune with your sexual desires and preferences?
layout: Two-column compare. Left side outlines 'What Excites Me', such as fantasies and past experiences. Right side highlights 'What Holds Me Back', including fears and societal norms.

caption: How connected are you to your body right now?
layout: Cycle diagram. Phases include 'Awakening', 'Acceptance', 'Integration', and 'Embodiment', detailing exercises and reflections for each phase.

title: The Heart-Head Connection

caption: Are you experiencing a change in your sexual desires?
layout: Infographic flow chart. Starts with 'Myth of Loss' leading to 'New Perspectives' and then branching out to 'Rediscovering Passion' and 'Exploring New Frontiers'.

title: The Empowered Woman's Checklist
caption: Do you check in with yourself regularly?

layout: Two-column compare. One side covers 'Effective Communication Tactics', while the other covers 'Common Pitfalls to Avoid' in midlife relationships.

layout: 4-stage progression. Stages include 'Identification of Fear', 'Understanding Origin', 'Communicating with Partner', and 'Taking Action', with insights for each stage.

layout: Cycle diagram. Phases include 'Curiosity', 'Exploration', 'Expression', and 'Integration', detailing activities and reflections for each phase.

title: From Compromise to Collaboration

layout: 2x2 grid with 'Gratitude' (low/high) and 'Passion' (low/high) as axes, outlining characteristics of each quadrant in relationships.
